name: Coca-Cola Europacific Partners
analysis: CCEP has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 7% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at $100.4200. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $101.5900, stop $95.0004, target $121.3588 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
